clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME] ("Service Provider").
This Agreement governs the provision of [PROJECT_NAME] by the Service Provider to the Client.
The Service Provider shall produce the podcast services described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED] for [PODCAST_NAME].
The Client shall pay the Service Provider [TOTAL_VALUE] for the Services, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD] according to the schedule agreed between the Parties.
If the Client fails to pay any amount due by its due date, the Service Provider may charge interest on the overdue amount at [LATE_PAYMENT_RATE] per month.
The Service Provider retains copyright in the Deliverables. Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a [LICENSE_SCOPE] license to use the Deliverables for [PERMITTED_USE].
Where the Services include a video version of the podcast, the Service Provider shall provide it for an additional fee of [VIDEO_PODCAST_FEE].
Where the Services include short-form social clips, the Service Provider shall deliver [NUMBER_OF_SOCIAL_CLIPS] clips per [BILLING_PERIOD] for an additional fee of [SOCIAL_CLIPS_FEE].
Where the Services include transcription, the Service Provider shall deliver written transcripts of the episodes described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED] for an additional fee of [TRANSCRIPTION_FEE].
Where the Service Provider manages publishing, the podcast shall be released according to [PUBLISHING_SCHEDULE].
The Service Provider shall deliver an analytics report per [BILLING_PERIOD] summarizing downloads, listens, and other metrics described in [ANALYTICS_SCOPE].

The Service Provider shall use only music and other third-party content for which it holds the necessary rights for the podcast use described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED], unless the Client supplies the content and warrants it holds the necessary rights.

Each Party shall keep confidential any non-public information disclosed by the other Party in connection with this Agreement and shall not disclose it without the disclosing Party's prior written consent.
The Service Provider shall deliver the podcast assets described in [DELIVERABLES_SCOPE].

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform its obligations to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence. The affected Party shall notify the other Party without undue delay.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.

The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE]. Ambiguity: none — Copyright Clause explicitly separates episode ownership from use rights, matching the Market-wide IP pattern while fitting podcast media. Duplication: Social Clips, Transcription, and Analytics Reports are distinct deliverables, not overlapping. Loophole closed: Licensing Clause places rights responsibility on whichever Party supplies third-party content, preventing silent rights assumptions. Contradiction: none. Missing protection: Publishing Schedule added because release cadence is a core operational driver in podcasting, unlike static audio production. Complexity: minimal, with video-podcast and clipping deliverables separated to avoid a bundled media ambiguity. Enforceability: publishing schedule and analytics cadence are explicit Dynamic Fields. Attack: Client assumes the podcast episode files and clips are wholly owned outright without any license nuance — mitigated by the Copyright Clause. Attack: A release is missed and Client claims the producer must compensate for lost audience growth — mitigated by the Publishing Schedule Clause making the schedule a managed obligation rather than a growth guarantee. Attack: Music rights are unresolved and later blocked by a platform — mitigated by the Licensing Clause's explicit rights allocation. No further gaps found. Version 1.0.0 — Self-Review and Red Team passed — Pending Human Legal Review.
